text:

device tree used

Non-boot CPUs not started on ARMADA XP MV78460:

We see the following in dmesg:

Dram Scrubbing starting (use XOR chanel 1)
       CS 0 Dram Scrubbing  0x1000000:0xffffffff
       CS 1 Dram Scrubbing  0x0:0xffffffff
